# [Process/Task] Checklist

## Purpose
Ensure consistent and complete execution of [process/task].

## When to Use This Checklist
- [Situation 1]
- [Situation 2]
- Frequency: [Daily/Weekly/Per deployment]

## Pre-requisites
- [ ] Requirement 1
- [ ] Requirement 2
- [ ] Required tools installed
- [ ] Required access granted

## Checklist

### Phase 1: Preparation
- [ ] **Task 1.1:** Review requirements and scope
  - [ ] Subtask A
  - [ ] Subtask B
- [ ] **Task 1.2:** Gather necessary resources
  - [ ] Resource A available
  - [ ] Resource B prepared
- [ ] **Task 1.3:** Notify stakeholders
  - [ ] Team notified
  - [ ] Users informed (if applicable)
- [ ] **Task 1.4:** Set up environment
  - [ ] Development environment ready
  - [ ] Test data prepared

### Phase 2: Execution
- [ ] **Task 2.1:** Execute step 1
  - [ ] Action A completed
  - [ ] Action B verified
- [ ] **Task 2.2:** Execute step 2
  - [ ] Checkpoint 1 passed
  - [ ] Checkpoint 2 passed
- [ ] **Task 2.3:** Quality checks
  - [ ] Code review completed
  - [ ] Tests passing
  - [ ] Documentation updated

### Phase 3: Verification
- [ ] **Task 3.1:** Test functionality
  - [ ] Unit tests passing
  - [ ] Integration tests passing
  - [ ] User acceptance tests passed
- [ ] **Task 3.2:** Validate results
  - [ ] Output matches expectations
  - [ ] Performance within thresholds
  - [ ] Security requirements met
- [ ] **Task 3.3:** Review compliance
  - [ ] Compliance with standards
  - [ ] Licensing requirements met
  - [ ] Accessibility standards met

### Phase 4: Deployment/Completion
- [ ] **Task 4.1:** Deploy to target environment
  - [ ] Pre-deployment checklist completed
  - [ ] Backup taken
  - [ ] Rollback plan ready
- [ ] **Task 4.2:** Post-deployment verification
  - [ ] Smoke tests passing
  - [ ] Monitoring alerts configured
  - [ ] Logs showing normal operation
- [ ] **Task 4.3:** Documentation
  - [ ] Runbook updated
  - [ ] User documentation updated
  - [ ] Knowledge base articles created

### Phase 5: Cleanup & Review
- [ ] **Task 5.1:** Clean up temporary resources
  - [ ] Test data removed
  - [ ] Temporary files deleted
  - [ ] Environment restored
- [ ] **Task 5.2:** Review and improve
  - [ ] Lessons learned documented
  - [ ] Process improvements identified
  - [ ] Checklist updated based on experience

## Success Criteria
- [ ] Criteria 1: [Measurable outcome]
- [ ] Criteria 2: [Measurable outcome]
- [ ] Criteria 3: [Measurable outcome]

## Exit Criteria
The task is considered complete when:
1. All required checklist items are checked
2. Success criteria are met
3. Documentation is updated
4. Stakeholders are informed

## Common Pitfalls & Solutions
| Pitfall | Solution |
|---------|----------|
| Missing prerequisite | Verify checklist before starting |
| Incomplete testing | Use test coverage tools |
| Poor communication | Regular status updates |

## Escalation Path
If issues arise:
1. Contact: [Primary contact]
2. Escalate to: [Secondary contact]
3. Emergency contact: [Emergency contact]

## References
- [Related process document]
- [Tool documentation]
- [Training materials]
